info.title: Appwrite
info.description: Appwrite backend as a service cuts up to 70% of the time and costs required for building a modern application. We abstract and simplify common development tasks behind a REST APIs, to help you develop your app in a fast and secure way. For full API documentation and tutorials go to [https://appwrite.io/docs](https://appwrite.io/docs)

get.description: Send a ping to project as part of onboarding.

post.description: Create a new player using a request model.
Create multiple players using an array of request models.

x-appwrite.edit: https://github.com/appwrite/appwrite/edit/masterCreate players with array of request models.

post.description: Fixture-only general method used to verify method exclusion does not remove the whole service.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Array of query strings generated using the Query class provided by the SDK.

headers.description: HTTP headers of execution. Defaults to empty.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of model to return (mock or stub)

get.description: Fixture-only service used to verify excluded services do not leak generated artifacts.

post.description: Fixture-only request model path used to verify excluded services also exclude models.

tags.name: account
tags.description: The Account service allows you to authenticate and manage a user account.

tags.name: avatars
tags.description: The Avatars service aims to help you complete everyday tasks related to your app image, icons, and avatars.

tags.name: databases
tags.description: The Databases service allows you to create structured collections of documents, query and filter lists of documents

tags.name: locale
tags.description: The Locale service allows you to customize your app based on your users' location.

tags.name: health
tags.description: The Health service allows you to both validate and monitor your Appwrite server's health.

tags.name: projects
tags.description: The Project service allows you to manage all the projects in your Appwrite server.

tags.name: project
tags.description: The Project service allows you to manage all the projects in your Appwrite server.

tags.name: storage
tags.description: The Storage service allows you to manage your project files.

tags.name: teams
tags.description: The Teams service allows you to group users of your project and to enable them to share read and write access to your project resources

tags.name: users
tags.description: The Users service allows you to manage your project users.

tags.name: functions
tags.description: The Functions Service allows you view, create and manage your Cloud Functions.

tags.name: proxy
tags.description: The Proxy Service allows you to configure actions for your domains beyond DNS configuration.

tags.name: graphql
tags.description: The GraphQL API allows you to query and mutate your Appwrite server using GraphQL.

tags.name: console
tags.description: The Console service allows you to interact with console relevant informations.

tags.name: migrations
tags.description: The Migrations service allows you to migrate third-party data to your Appwrite project.

tags.name: zzexcludedservice
tags.description: Fixture-only excluded service used by tests.

type.description: Error type. You can learn more about all the error types at https://appwrite.io/docs/error-codes#errorTypes

entries.description: List of mock or stub entries.

legacyOptions.description: Union of mock or stub resolved through legacy items.

legacyMock.description: Nested mock resolved through legacy items.

Bearer.description: The OAuth access token to authenticate with

Session.name: X-Appwrite-Session
Session.description: The user session to authenticate with
